disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Urine has been persistently frothy and foamy every time the patient voids
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed anything different about your urine?
Is your urine frothy or a strange colour?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — it's really frothy and foamy, like the head on a beer, every single time I go now.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Rapid, massive whole-body swelling with about 6 kg unintentional weight gain over ten days
trigger_question_examples: How quickly has the swelling come on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's blown up over about a week and I've put on around 6 kilos in ten days — my face, legs and belly are all swollen.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Breathlessness when lying flat, relieved by propping up on pillows
trigger_question_examples: Are you short of breath at all?
Is it harder to breathe lying down?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: A bit — when I lie flat I get short of breath, so I've been propping myself up on pillows to sleep.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Facial and periorbital swelling that is worst first thing in the morning
trigger_question_examples: Is the swelling around your eyes worse at any particular time?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My face and eyes puff up the most, and it's worst when I wake up — this morning I could barely open my eyes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever and no burning or stinging when passing urine
trigger_question_examples: Any burning or pain when you pass urine?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers, and no burning or pain when I go to the toilet.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: At present no chest pain, no coughing up blood, and no pain, redness or swelling in only one calf
trigger_question_examples: Any chest pain or coughing up blood?
Is one calf painful, red or more swollen than the other?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No chest pain and I'm not coughing up blood. Both legs are swollen the same — neither one is more painful or red than the other.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: It's mainly the swelling and being so tired that's bothering me.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not on any regular medications and has not been taking anti-inflammatory painkillers
trigger_question_examples: Are you taking any regular medications?
Have you been taking any anti-inflammatory painkillers like ibuprofen?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No regular medications at all, and I haven't been taking any ibuprofen or anti-inflammatories.
